name: To.Two
overview: To.two is an extremely popular social media app with a catch; you can only get in based on invite. This web drama explores how this app creates social barriers between the students based on who can access the invite.

trailers.title: 두 사람에게만 주는 SNS 티켓 [투투] 티저 ㅣ (ENG sub) [Web drama] To.two TEASER
